RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
Observing the utopian haven of [nation]Fooooooooo[/nation], resting in the quaint realm of [region]Balder[/region], and resolving to unearth the vital role the nation’s leader, Fuzzy the Owl, has played in developing the Balderan identity,
Starting with Fuzzy’s entry into Balderan politics in 2012, at that time a hotbed of conflicts due to the community’s nascent status, and their election into the Storting (the region’s parliament); they became one of the chief drivers of activity in the legislature through their equanimous engagements with their colleagues, soon assuming the post of Talman (Speaker) due to this demeanor,
Understanding that Fuzzy then went on to become one of the longest serving and most impactful Talmans in the region’s history; chief amidst their numerous achievements in the position is their orchestration of Balder’s peaceful transition to a monarchy in 2013, allowing the fledging Balderan community to breath a sigh of relief for the first time since its inception,
Uncovering Fuzzy’s adventures as one of Balder’s premier hosts of carnivals and jamborees, where the interregional community first came to interact with the Foooooooooan leader’s puntastic ways through events like Dragons of the Frozen Sea, a bilateral festival jointly hosted with The West Pacific (TWP) to celebrate the start of a new, enduring relationship between the two regions,
Noticing a pattern about Fuzzy’s admirable drive to improve the Balderan society, best exemplified through their work as the Minister of Integration of Balder; under their guidance, new integration and retention practices were implemented that resulted in the Delegate’s endorsement count soaring from just above 100 to almost 200, amplifying the region’s voice in the World Assembly,
Analyzing Fuzzy’s investiture into Balder’s esteemed nobility as the Crown Prince (Vice Delegate) to North East Somerset following the latter’s first coronation as King; apart from aiding in the strengthening of regional security (a task they dutifully continue to this day), they served as one of the primary impetuses behind constitutional reforms that separated the roles of head of state (King) and head of government (Statsminister), boosting the efficiency of the government and leading to the formation of the modern Balderan executive that has persevered into the modern era,
Recalling Fuzzy’s pioneering stint as the first Statsminister of Balder, where they set a high bar for all subsequent Statsministers through their exemplary work; they laid down the administrative foundations of the newly-created position which helped their successors ease into the role and would later return in the post in 2020 to restore stability into the region in the aftermath of Operation Heimdall, an internal plot to overthrow Balder’s sitting government,
Investigating Fuzzy’s momentary detour into the fabled land of [region]Albion[/region], which they helped to discover and spread the word of as one of its original settlers; it was thanks to their efforts that Albion ballooned to over 400 nations within a short period of time, allowing the community to flourish on an unprecedented level,
Reliving the magical culture Fuzzy helped curate during their stay in Albion, guided by the wisdom acquired from their early Balder days; Albion throughout its existence came to be known as a domain of unbridled whimsy, partly due to the dazzling fests Fuzzy helped organize like: [list][*]the Royal Festival, which celebrated the conclusion of the first-ever elections held in the realm, [*]the Falling Leaves Festival, which honored the coming of autumn in a multiverse-spanning revelry and saw over a thousand posts lodged onto the regional forums as a result, and, [*]the Solstice Celebration, a jointly-held gala with Europeia which commemorated the signing of the Treaty of Friendship between the two regions,[/list]
Returning to Balder, where Fuzzy proved themselves to be a consummate diplomat, devoted towards bettering the region’s transborder standing, by: [list][*]revitalizing relations with TWP, already a long-standing ally, which saw the two regions come closer than ever before, [*]supporting The East Pacific during Fedele’s failed coup, and negotiating the Treaty of Aarhus with the community immediately after, and, [*]thawing long-cold ties with The South Pacific by brokering the Pact of the Centre of the Earth, marking a shift in Balderan foreign policy by making peace with former defender rivals,[/list]
Rejoicing at Fuzzy’s ascension to the throne of Balder as King, the culmination of a decade of impeccable servitude towards the region; during their reign, Fuzzy spearheaded fundamental legislative reforms that incentivized citizen participation and led Balder to war against adherents of Raider Unity for their aggression against allies,
Believing that Fuzzy’s awe-inspiring dedication towards Balder and its interests deserves recognition from this august assembly,
Hereby commends Fooooooooo.
RESOLUTION.NAME: Commend Fooooooooo
